nasb.text: You shall offer up in smoke the whole ram on the altar; it is a burnt offering to the Lord: it is a soothing aroma, an offering by fire to the Lord.

esv.text: and burn the whole ram on the altar. It is a burnt offering to the Lord. It is a pleasing aroma, a food offering to the Lord.

cnv.text: 你要把整隻公綿羊焚燒在祭壇上；這是獻給耶和華的燔祭，是獻給耶和華馨香的火祭。

ccb.text: 然后，把整只羊放在祭坛上焚烧，这是献给耶和华的燔祭，是蒙耶和华悦纳的馨香火祭。
